basic_details.job_title: IIT Kanpur Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur) Research Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website iitk.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Kanpur Research Assistant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate degree in Social Science, Management, or a related discipline with a minimum of 55% marks, along with NET/M.Phil./Ph.D. and a good academic record.
qualification.details: Postgraduate degree in Social Science, Management, or a related discipline with a minimum of 55% marks, along with NET/M.Phil./Ph.D. and a good academic record.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 28-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Kanpur Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Research Assistant position at IIT Kanpur is 28th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Assistant role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Postgraduate degree in Social Science, Management, or a related discipline with at least 55% marks, along with NET/M.Phil./Ph.D. and a strong academic record.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 37,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Research Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves two stages: initial shortlisting based on the candidate's CV, followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this job opening?
faq.answer: Interested candidates are required to apply by sending their application via Email.

faq.question: Q7. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted by the Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur).

faq.question: Q8. How many vacancies are available for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Research Assistant position announced by IIT Kanpur.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: The position of Research Assistant is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where is IIT Kanpur located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur is located in Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh.
